data.title: Seven Extreme Tests, Full‑Scenario Ecosystem: Sungrow Redefines C&I ESS Reliability at GRES
data.description: In Hefei, China, on April 29, 2026, Sungrow made a significant announcement at the 2026 Global Renewable Energy Summit. The company introduced its comprehensive commercial and industrial (C&I) ecosystem, focusing on the innovative PowerKeeper series. This newly launched modular C&I energy storage system is designed to eliminate waste entirely, marking a remarkable advancement in sustainable energy solutions.
Israel’s foreign minister stated that disagreements exist with the United States regarding the issue of regime change in Iran

data.title: EQT makes infrastructure more accessible to individual investors across Europe - introduces new ELTIF evergreen fund
data.description: EQT has introduced the EQT Nexus ELTIF Infrastructure, a new European Long-Term Investment Fund structure for its Nexus Infrastructure evergreen strategy. This launch is set to increase private market access for qualified individuals and institutions within the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA). The EQT Nexus ELTIF Infrastructure is designed to offer investment opportunities in EQT's infrastructure projects, expanding on the firm's commitment to providing diversified investment options.

data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Annual General Meeting – Notice
data.description: The 2026 Annual General Meeting of Hafnia Limited is scheduled to take place on Tuesday, May 26, 2026, at 10 Pasir Panjang Road, Mapletree Business City #18-01, Singapore 117438, starting at 09:00 local time. Documents including the Notice of Annual General Meeting, Appendix A, and Form of Proxy are attached for reference. Hafnia Limited is a prominent tanker owner globally, involved in the transportation of oil and oil products.

data.title: PAIDI Technology Debuts at Two Major Global Events of Chery, Empowering New Global Commercial Value with Chinese Innovative Manufacturing
data.description: In April 2026, PAIDI Technology showcased its products at two significant international gatherings organized by Chery Group in WUHU, China. The events attracted participants from around 100 nations and regions, including prominent global merchants. Key markets like Southeast Asia, Europe, and the Americas were extensively represented.

data.title: Envision Joins AEA Ammonia Certification System Pilot to Accelerate Global Clean Ammonia Trade
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Envision Energy, a renowned company in green technology, stated its involvement in the initial stage of the AEA Ammonia Certification System. This system was created by the Ammonia Energy Association (AEA) to streamline the certification process globally.

data.title: Bizzdesign Named a Leader in Strategic Portfolio Management Tools, Q2 2026 Report by Independent Research Firm
data.description: In the Dutch city of Enschede, Bizzdesign, a company specializing in enterprise transformation software, was recognized as a top player in The Forrester Wave™ report on Strategic Portfolio Management Tools for the second quarter of 2026. The assessment, which featured 13 key industry providers, highlighted Bizzdesign's leadership in this category.
